qMetaDef.title: Deprecated charts
qMetaDef.description: Occasionally, Qlik needs to deprecate old charts. This sheet tracks events generated when users access sheets containing these charts to make migrating off of these charts easier.

qMsg.qv: No deprecated chart events were found.

qStringExpression.qExpr: 'Deprecated charts are logged when a sheet is opened. Removing a chart from an app will not remove events relating to that object, so use the last impacted session date to determine event freshness. Deleted apps are excluded.'
